  "brief_explanation": "Lemon's basis in the 800 shares of stock sold is $400, calculated by taking the original purchase price per share ($10.50) and multiplying it by the number of shares (2000 total shares). Then, dividing this amount by the total number of shares after receiving the non-taxable dividend (which increased the total to 2080 shares), and finally multiplying that result by the number of shares sold (800)."
}
